title: Jensen Huang made $172 billion selling AI chips. He just gave $75 million to an art school.
summary: Jensen and Lori Huang have given Vanderbilt University $75 million to establish the Jen-Hsun and Lori Huang College of Art, Architecture and Design in San Francisco. Vanderbilt will establish a California College of the Arts Institute to preserve CCA’s traditions.
